pillars.name: Housing
sub_bullets: Should we find temporary accommodation?
How are the neighbourhoods?
Do we want to rent or buy?

pillars.name: Admin
sub_bullets: Should we register at the new city hall?
Do we need a local bank account?
How do we update our official address?

pillars.name: Logistics
sub_bullets: Should we book a moving company?
What do we do with our current furniture?
When should we start packing?

pillars.name: Social
sub_bullets: How do we meet new people?
Are there clubs or communities we could join?
How do we stay in touch with old friends?

pillars.name: Finances
sub_bullets: What is the cost of living in the new city?
Have we set a budget for the move?
Will our taxes or income change?

pillars.name: Healthcare
sub_bullets: How do we find a new doctor?
Do we need to change our health insurance?
How do we transfer our prescriptions?

pillars.name: Transport
sub_bullets: What are the public transport options?
Will we need a car?
How long is the commute to work?

pillars.name: Work
sub_bullets: What is our notice period at the current job?
What do we need to sort out for the first day?
Will the new role be remote or in-office?
